query.sparql:
SELECT ?work ?workLabel
WHERE {
  ?author wdt:P50 ?work .
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author .
  ?author wdt:P50 wd:Q216476 .
  ?work wdt:P407 ?language .
  FILTER (?language = wd:Q1860) .
  ?work wdt:P921 ?theme .
  FILTER CONTAINS(lcase(?theme), "middle school") .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P279* wd:Q11696 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  FILTER (xsd:gYear(?date) > 1990)
}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112  ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P161  "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

WHERE {

}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?person ?queenMusic ?releaseDate
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P570 ?deathDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?deathDate) = 1969) .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P406 ?soundtrack .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P9899 ?createdFor .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?createdFor), "queen")) .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P483 ?studio .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P6439 ?lyrics .
  BIND(YEAR(?deathDate) AS ?yearOfDeath) .
  ?queenMusic wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(?releaseDate < ?deathDate) .
}

question.string: in which language does the united stated have the shortest short name?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lang ?langLabel (MIN(LENGTH(?shortName)) AS ?minLength)
WHERE
{
  wd:Q30 p:P1813 ?shortNameStatement .
  ?shortNameStatement ps:P1813 ?shortName .
  ?shortNameStatement pq:P407 ?lang .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
  FILTER(LANG(?shortName) = LANGMATCHES(LANG(?langLabel), "en"))
}
GROUP BY ?lang ?langLabel
ORDER BY ?minLength
LIMIT 1

question.string: What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?number_of_deaths)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?event wdt:P1465 ?place .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birth .
  ?person wdt:P570 ?death .
  FILTER(YEAR(?death) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?death) <= 1920) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?event ?eventLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_deaths)
LIMIT 1

question.string: What is the TV-show that starred Rowan Atkinson , had 4 seasons and started in 1983?
What is the english nickname of Ella Fitzgerald?
What are the occupations of Kazuo Ishiguro’s daughter?
What are the occupations of Nat King Cole?
what is the official language of iran?
What is the population in Freiburg ?
What is the title of the 2020 released movie in which Carey Mulligan was the main actress?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?title
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?releaseDate) = 2020) .
  ?item wdt:P161 ?actor .
  ?actor wdt:P1477 "Carey Mulligan"@en .
  ?item wdt:P1476 ?title .
}

question.string: What does Ray-Ban produce primarily?
What language did the famous king, who was also a student of Aristotle's , speak?
What language do they speak in Poland ?
How many different languages are spoken in West Europe?
Is Germany bigger than Poland?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?germanyArea ?polandArea
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q183 AS ?germany) .
  BIND(wd:Q36 AS ?poland) .
  ?germany wdt:P2046 ?germanyArea .
  ?poland wdt:P2046 ?polandArea .
  FILTER (?germanyArea > ?polandArea)
}

question.string: What notes does a C major chord consist of?

query.sparql: SELECT ?note WHERE { wd:Q55706505 wdt:P1897 ?note }

question.string: How many different occupations did/do spouses of winners of the Nobel Prize in Literature hold?
How many other video games began the same year as Dead by Daylight?
What other civilizations existed during the Aztecs ?
What brand uses petroleum jelly?
How many other musical films were launched the same year as Grease?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?film) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  ?film wdt:P577 ?date .
  wd:Q611626 wdt:P577 ?greaseDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = YEAR(?greaseDate)) .
  FILTER(?film != wd:Q611626) .
}

  ?painting wdt:P577 ?date .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1

question.string: When was the first album of the American band Typhoon released?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?releaseDate ?albumLabel
WHERE {
  wd:Q140588 wdt:P31 wd:Q5618 .
  wd:Q140588 wdt:P740 ?album .
  ?album wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  ?album wdt:P264 ?albumLabel .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?album wdt:P577 ?earlierReleaseDate .
                      ?earlierAlbum wdt:P577 ?earlierReleaseDate .
                      FILTER (?earlierReleaseDate < ?releaseDate) .
                      ?earlierAlbum wdt:P740 wd:Q140588 . }
} ORDER BY ASC(?releaseDate)
LIMIT 1

question.string: Are there at least two winners of the Academy Award for Best Actress who have been educated at the same institution?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?institution (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q1381869 .
  ?winner wdt:P69 ?education .
  ?education wdt:P769 ?institution .
}
GROUP BY ?institution
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) > 1)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?populationGrowth
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q183 .

  FILTER (?populationGrowth >= 1) .
  ?item wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER (?date >= "2010-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?member ?age WHERE {
  ?member wdt:P102 wd:Q61868578.

}
ORDER BY ?age
LIMIT 1
